feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 关于月度结算请求处理
entry.content: 希望通过创建月度结算请求处理作业，实现每月仅自动执行当月结算项目的功能。 但发现当执行结算处理作业时（使用APP：締め請求処理のスケジュール　日本），如果存在下月结算项目的销售单据，系统不仅会处理当月项目，还会同时登记下月的结算处理。 具体如下（5月和6月结算问题）： ① 开票日期5月12日 → 5月结算（正确） ② 开票日期5月15日 → 5月结算（正确） ③ 开票日期5月21日 → 6月结算（问题：本应在6月处理，却在5月就被处理了） 这种情况下，5月和6月的结算处理都会被登记。但我希望③在6月结算单据，应该在6月21日执行的作业中进行结算处理登记。 如果有描述不清楚的地方还请追问。 请问应该怎么进行设置非常感谢！

entry.title: 銀行媒體檔(Map Format Data)格式，明細行流水號設置
entry.content:
大家好，我想請問一個關於銀行媒體檔(Map Format Data)明細行欄位設置的問題，

若明細行欄位需要設置"流水號"如下圖0001/0002/0003，是否能透過在標準功能設置，生成流水號，或是得用其他方式處理?

entry.title: No payment medium created due to invalid bank or branch name in bank master record , country/region
entry.content:
Dear community,

I got the following error, tried a solution on the SAP note, but am still facing the same error.

①Error(Invalid bank or branch name in bank master record , country/region)

②Solution on SAP note 3478710 - No Payment Media file generated for Payment Medium Format JP_ZENGINKYO - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

③What I maintained according to the solution

 

→still facing the same error

 

 

As the SAP note says, I maintained the branch data via the App Manage Banks - Master Data. What can I do further to solve this error?

I appreciate any information related to this error!!!

Thanks & Regards,

*The setting was missing below

entry.title: Automate tasks in FO in S/4 HANA Public cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello Freinds,

we are in explore phase of our project for S/4 HANA CLoud TM. I have given demo to client on scope item 6W2, 6W3 and 6W4. CLient says that it is too much of manual work to do in FO for e.g one has to do manual activity "setting to ready for Transport execution " and also create "delivery manually by clicking "create delivery button" and also manually add events like check in, check out etc and also manually enter procuring company code, purchase org.

How can we automate the above. I could not find standard batch jobs for delivery creation and "ready for Transp execution status". Can someone point out if the batch job exists ?

ANy pointers how check in check out and purchase org etc can be automated without users to manually  enter them ?

iam of the view S/4 HANA cloud is for those customers who agree on fit to standard but  in our case, things are but different.

rgds

sar

entry.title: Bank account balance issue
entry.content:
• Why balance for no bank account assigned still show in APP - bank account balance? Checked the relevant no bank account entries and no plan level is assigned, but why they still include in SCP_GEN profile balance result?
  • App Cash Flow Analyzer displays cash flows under group Bank Account: Not Assigned.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to find the change log for Business Partner Master data ?
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We require the change log for Business Partners from April to March. Change log should have all the fields that were changed during this period for example Bank Account number , Address etc.

Please let us know how to get the Change log for SAP Public Cloud.

 

 

 

Thanks and Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Profit Center Assignment in Customer/Supplier in SAP S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a business requirement where one Supplier or Customer may be debited or credited directly, and the corresponding entry is posted to another Supplier or Customer.

Currently, the "Post General Journal Entries" app does not support the selection of Customer or Supplier accounts, which limits our ability to post these transactions directly through journal entries.

As a workaround, we are using the "Clear Incoming Payment" and "Clear Outgoing Payment" applications to perform these transactions. However, in these apps, we are unable to assign a Profit Center, which is essential for our internal reporting and profitability analysis.

We would appreciate your guidance on the following points

  1. Is there any way to allow Customer and Supplier accounts to be posted together using a journal entry app?

  2. How can we assign Profit Centers in these clearing scenarios, or is there an alternative recommended approach?

We look forward to your suggestions.

Regards,

Prince Ebi

entry.title: Map Format Data for Payments 中文字元長度設置問題
entry.content:
我們在設置銀行媒體檔的時候遇到一個問題，一般產出檔案時，不管中英文字元都是1長度，
由於銀行檔案規格是一個中文字元占用2長度，請問我要如何設定才能將中文字設定一個中文字為2長度，

若沒有這樣設置，對銀行來說檔案格式就是錯誤的！
已經有嘗試使用"Enable Length in Bytes "，但是沒有效果，還請各位專家解答！

entry.title: How to display the field "Trademark" in the "Manage Product Master Data" app?
entry.content:
The "Product" information has a native field "MARA-BRAND_ID". How can I display and edit this field in the "Manage Product Master Data" app? The field is only 4 characters long—how can I save a longer trademark name? How do I add this field in the "Data Migration" - "Product" template?

##SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition##SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Master Dat

  •

entry.title: Adoption of the EUR and new company code in EUR in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, everyone,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud at a large client in the manufacturing industry in Bulgaria.

Since Bulgaria's national currency is BGN, we have configured CBC in BGN as Local Currency and EUR as Group Currency. However, in relation to Bulgaria's adoption of the EURO most likely from 1 Jan 2026, we will now have to create a new company code in EUR once SAP releases the content for Bulgaria in EUR.

My questions are:

  • What is the fastest and most automated way to transfer the current configurations of the Development/Test/Production System into the new company code?
  • Has anyone used SAP's technical teams to make a system copy? If yes, how long did it take?

You can also share any other valuable lessons learned in relation to this topic.

Many thanks for your help,

Stella

entry.title: Remove Material Type ERSA in Unplanned Maintenance Components
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have a question regarding the app "Perform Maintenance Job":

When a user adds an unplannend component the material type has the default value "ERSA". We are not using any ERSA materials and therefore no results appear. 

Is there an option to remove or change this default value? Please see also screenshot attached.

 

Thank you and BR
Mona

entry.title: ABAP Runtime Error in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2-System Landscape) while Using MIGO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system with a 2-system landscape. While using the MIGO app, I encountered an ABAP runtime error (screenshot attached), which is preventing me from using the related apps.

Has anyone faced a similar issue or knows the reason behind this error? I would greatly appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve it.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Sanjay

entry.title: Discrepancy in planned effort in "Plan Customer Projects" and C_EngmntProjFcstQuery_2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We see some discrepancy in planned effort of Work Package and planned effort value in C_EngmntProjFcstQuery_2  query.

For example, planned effort for month of May 2025 is 100 hours but in the query we are having the value as 90 hours.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: A report or feasible view is needed to view or analyze Sales order line-item costing
entry.content:
Users are required to get the sales order line-item wise costing in a single report. Please suggest which SAP Fiori app can provide this functionality in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create a new org unit without affecting the current set up in development customizing?
entry.content:
Knowing that after creating a organizational unit it cannot be deleted, would be possible to create a new organizational unit, like a company code, without affecting the current organizational unit?

For example, being able to test a new organization without affecting what is already set up in the development customizing tenant?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Payment Times Report - Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
Executing payment times report, but currently, SAP only generates the Payment times report (PTR) in csv format. Is there any way to obtain the responsible member declaration template from SAP? If not, it is possible to include this in the existing functionality?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Add field CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup to API/BO Interface DebitMemoRequest/CustomerReturn
entry.content:
I have checked the provided API and BO INTERFACE, and i can not found the field "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup". So how can I fill "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup" into CustomerReturn and DebitMemoRequest.

DebitMemoRequest API: /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_DEBIT_MEMO_REQUEST_SRV/A_DebitMemoRequest('70000015')

CustomerReturn API: /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV/A_CustomerReturn('60000069')

DebitMemoRequest BO INTERFACE: i_debitmemorequesttp

CustomerReturn BO INTERFACE: i_customerreturntp

entry.title: 自動付款可否跨公司不同公司幣別進行付款
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
商業情境為母公司代子公司付款，但母公司和子公司的公司幣別不同，因系統上標準功能設定傳送公司為子公司付款公司為母公司，限制為：母公司幣別與子公司幣別國家及扣繳稅類型需相同，故無法使用大批付款。

請問要如何解決上述沖銷情境。

entry.title: 未本地化國家的公司幣別如何設定？
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
因導入公司所設籍公司並未本地化，故只能選擇德國，但公司幣別因無法更改會自動決定為歐元。

兩個問題：

1.要如何將公司改為開曼?

2.設定公司後要如何將公司改為USD?
